title: 10 best herbal tinctures for bunion
description: Chamomile tinctures helps with bunion because it possesses anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that soothe the affected area, reducing pain and swelling. The tincture's calming effects also help to relax the surrounding tissues and ligaments, which can become inflamed and tight due to the bone spur.
